definition: Key Performance Indicator — a measurable value that tracks progress toward a business objective.
extendedDefinition: KPIs translate abstract goals like "improve customer satisfaction" into concrete, trackable metrics. Common SaaS KPIs include monthly recurring revenue (MRR), customer acquisition cost (CAC), and net promoter score (NPS). Teams use dashboards to monitor KPIs in real time and make data-driven decisions. Choosing the right KPIs ensures everyone is aligned on what success looks like.
